Barbell Bench Press.description: An upper-body compound exercise performed by pressing a barbell upwards while lying flat on a bench.
formCues: Keep your feet flat on the floor
Retract your shoulder blades into the bench
Lower the bar to your mid-chest
Drive the bar up while keeping your elbows tucked at a 45-degree angle

Dumbbell Goblet Squat.description: A front-loaded squat variation performed by holding a single dumbbell vertically against the chest to target the lower body and core.
formCues: Hold the dumbbell vertically close to your chest
Keep your torso upright and chest high
Push your knees out as you sink into the squat
Drive through your full foot to stand

Single-Arm Dumbbell Row.description: A unilateral rowing movement that targets the upper back and lats while stabilizing the torso.
formCues: Keep your spine neutral and core engaged
Pull the dumbbell toward your hip
Lead the movement with your elbow
Avoid rotating your torso at the top

Recover.description: A designated period to rest, lower your heart rate, and prepare for the next set.
formCues: Exhale slowly to lower heart rate
Prepare mentally for the next effort
